summary: Gate K reviewed the CLI control-surface activation proposal and passed. The only authorized next work is a thin localhost devmasterd CLI client; Web, IDE, real providers, external repos, deploys, PRs, and production side effects remain forbidden.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Phase 8 CLI local client implementation with localhost smoke evidence, then run Gate L.
notes: Gate K authorizes CLI implementation only, not Web/IDE or real provider activation.
